helpText: Default build uses a hosted read-only snapshot feed. For local live development, change API base URL to http://127.0.0.1:4311.

triage.reasonSummary: Net margin survives tax with enough room to still matter. Recent flow is strong enough that the market looks genuinely active.

nextRuleHints: Avoid low-flow high-ticket items unless the fill looks unusually clean.
Do not force entry when the recent move already looks stretched.
Take partial exits sooner when the edge compresses.
Even on liquid runes, trim the position once the spread starts compressing.
Take partial exits sooner on stable, grindy items once the edge compresses.
Respect stretched entries even on popular gear items.
Do not overrate high-volume items when the post-tax edge is still tiny.
Treat mega-ticket items as trap-prone unless hourly flow is clearly real.

memoryPatterns.consequenceLabel: You tend to hold too long after the edge weakens.
memoryPatterns.nextRule: Even on liquid runes, trim the position once the spread starts compressing.

memoryPatterns.consequenceLabel: You are repeatedly trusting spreads that do not execute cleanly.
memoryPatterns.nextRule: Do not trust premium-gear spreads unless there is convincing recent flow.

memoryPatterns.consequenceLabel: You tend to chase moves after the best entry window has passed.
memoryPatterns.nextRule: Respect stretched entries even on popular gear items.

memoryPatterns.consequenceLabel: You keep forcing trades where friction destroys the usable edge.
memoryPatterns.nextRule: Do not overrate high-volume items when the post-tax edge is still tiny.

postmortemFeed.whatWentWrong: Held too long after the edge weakened.
postmortemFeed.notes: Still a good trade, but the exit lagged after the clean part of the move.
postmortemFeed.nextRule: Even on liquid runes, trim the position once the spread starts compressing.

postmortemFeed.whatWentWrong: Tax and slippage erased the paper edge.
postmortemFeed.notes: Looked fine until tax and tiny edge left almost nothing worth the effort.
postmortemFeed.nextRule: Do not overrate high-volume items when the post-tax edge is still tiny.

postmortemFeed.whatWentWrong: Held too long after the edge weakened.
postmortemFeed.notes: The trade worked, but too much edge was given back by holding for the full limit.
postmortemFeed.nextRule: Take partial exits sooner on stable, grindy items once the edge compresses.

postmortemFeed.whatWentWrong: Entered too late into an already extended move.
postmortemFeed.notes: Paid up after the move was already extended.
postmortemFeed.nextRule: Respect stretched entries even on popular gear items.

postmortemFeed.whatWentWrong: Trusted a spread that did not execute as cleanly as it looked.
postmortemFeed.notes: Another low-flow premium item that looked much cleaner on paper than in reality.
postmortemFeed.nextRule: Do not trust premium-gear spreads unless there is convincing recent flow.

postmortemFeed.whatWentWrong: Trusted a spread that did not execute as cleanly as it looked.
postmortemFeed.notes: Headline margin looked huge, but the market was far too concentrated.
postmortemFeed.nextRule: Treat mega-ticket items as trap-prone unless hourly flow is clearly real.

postmortemFeed.whatWentWrong: Entered too late into an already extended move.
postmortemFeed.nextRule: Do not force entry when the recent move already looks stretched.

postmortemFeed.whatWentWrong: Held too long after the edge weakened.
postmortemFeed.notes: Held too long after the spread weakened.
postmortemFeed.nextRule: Take partial exits sooner when the edge compresses.

postmortemFeed.whatWentWrong: Trusted a spread that did not execute as cleanly as it looked.
postmortemFeed.notes: Spread looked huge, exit quality was terrible.
postmortemFeed.nextRule: Avoid low-flow high-ticket items unless the fill looks unusually clean.
